title: astragalus unalii
intro: Astragalus unalii, also known as Unalii milkvetch, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and protecting against oxidative stress. Astragalus unalii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote health and resilience.
